main-capability.description:
Main window permissions — security model documented below.

Custom Tauri commands (#[tauri::command]) are NOT listed here because Tauri v2
does not require capability entries for them: they are automatically restricted
to the main window's WebView via IPC isolation (no other origin can call them).

Only built-in Tauri plugin permissions are declared here so that the principle
of least-privilege applies to system APIs (fs, shell, http, os, …). No such
plugins are currently enabled; the list below covers only the mandatory core
permissions required by Tauri v2 itself.
